name: Emily School Transport Inc
districts_or_customers: Saint Paul-area charter schools (per customer review)
recent_news: FMCSA registration last updated 2017; intrastate passenger carrier, USDOT 3042864, single power unit / single driver on file.
fit_notes: Sub-scale single-bus charter-school shuttle operator in Saint Paul; too small to be a meaningful tuck-in for Summit on its own but could be a route-bolt-on if Summit already has a Twin Cities footprint.

name: Lush Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: No web presence, no FMCSA hit, no district contract references found; unusual legal name suggests a shell/holding entity registered to provide bus service rather than an active operating school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: No evidence of an actual operating school-bus business under this name in San Mateo. Likely not a real tuck-in target; recommend dropping unless on-the-ground diligence shows an active operator.

name: On My Way School Taxi
recent_news: Active small business operating under 'On My Way Transportation LLC' brand; website live with 'Transporting You with Care' tagline; no recent M&A or news.
fit_notes: Boutique school-taxi/private-pay child transport in DFW (Garland) rather than yellow-bus contracting; small fleet but operates in same private-pay segment Summit increasingly competes against (Taxi Mom, HopSkipDrive). Niche tuck-in only if Summit is building a DFW alt-transport arm.

name: Sactown Bike Bus LLC
districts_or_customers: Tourists, corporate team-building, pub/wine/brewery tour customers
recent_news: Operates as 'Off the Chain Bike Bus Tours' at 1111 J St, Sacramento - pedal-powered 15-passenger party/brewery/wine tour vehicle; not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: NOT a student-transportation operator - this is a tourist pedal-bus brewery-tour business misclassified as school transport. Exclude from Summit target universe.

name: Beck Bus Co
recent_news: No web/FMCSA/news footprint located; registered to a residential Knoxville address (1708 Cottage Wood Way) which is typical of a shell or dormant single-bus entity rather than an active multi-route school contractor. Knox County Schools transportation is handled in-house plus KTG Bus / other contractors - no public reference to Beck Bus Co serving the district.
fit_notes: Residential-address single-name registration with no discoverable contracts, fleet, website, or news. Likely not a real operating school-bus contractor; deprioritize unless local diligence confirms an active book of business.
